import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut product = 1
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        1
      end
      product = product * v
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    1
  end
  product = product * v
end
println("product=#{product}")
